name: Organic Turmeric Powder
description: High-curcumin organic turmeric powder, stone-ground for maximum health benefits and vibrant color.

name: Kashmiri Red Chili Powder
description: Premium Kashmiri chilis known for their deep red color and mild heat, perfect for authentic Indian curries.

name: Tellicherry Black Pepper
description: Large, premium black pepper corns from the Malabar coast, highly aromatic with a bold citrusy flavor.

name: Green Cardamom (8mm Bold)
description: Highest grade green cardamom pods from Idukki, Kerala. Intense aroma and perfectly green.

name: Traditional Sambhar Masala
description: A secret family recipe blend for the most authentic South Indian Sambhar experience.

name: Garam Masala Gold Blend
description: Premium blend of 12 royal spices, slow-roasted to release essential oils for superior aroma.

name: Monsooned Malabar Coffee
description: Unique monsooned coffee beans with a heavy body and low acidity, offering a rich chocolatey finish.

name: Assam Orthodox Whole Leaf Tea
description: Pure single-origin Assam tea with bold leaves, producing a malty, full-bodied golden cup.

name: Jumbo Cashew Nuts (W180)
description: The 'King of Cashews'. Exceptionally large, crunchy, and creamy white whole nuts.

name: Premium California Almonds
description: High-quality almonds, rich in protein and fiber. Perfect for snacking or garnishing.

name: Mysore Nugget Coffee
description: Exquisite AAA grade Arabica beans from the Bababudangiri hills, known for their sweet aroma and mild flavor.

name: Iranian Pistachios (Roasted)
description: Lightly salted and roasted premium pistachios. Rich in antioxidants and incredibly flavorful.

name: Medjool Dates (Jumbo)
description: Often called the 'King of Dates', these are large, soft, and sweet with a rich caramel-like flavor.

name: Guntur Spicy Chilli Powder
description: Authentic Guntur chillies for the ultimate heat. Perfect for spicy Andhra and South Indian dishes.

name: Biryani Essence Masala Blend
description: A royal blend of mace, nutmeg, and stone flowers. The secret behind legendary biryani aromas.
